variant: give me an 8-week minoxidil timeline, week by week

request.message: give me an 8-week minoxidil timeline, week by week

response_body.response: don't have a week-by-week minoxidil timeline in your current docs. what i have is that minoxidil improves blood flow to follicles, stimulates growth, and increases thickness, but results take several months of consistency. here's what a standard 8-week minoxidil protocol looks like:  key points: apply to completely dry scalp (wet scalp reduces absorption), don't wash it off for at least 4 hours, and stick with it. shedding in weeks 4–6 is expected and means it's working. if you get scalp irritation, switch to foam or drop to once daily until it settles.

products.name: Kirkland Signature 5% Minoxidil Solution (6-month)
products.description: Generic 5% minoxidil liquid — same active as Rogaine, lower cost.
